mnemonics.title: Components of RL
mnemonics.content: AEAR - Agent, Environment, Actions, Rewards (the four core components)

mnemonics.title: MDP Elements
mnemonics.content: SAT RD - States, Actions, Transition probabilities, Reward function, Discount factor

mnemonics.title: Q-learning vs SARSA
mnemonics.content: Q Off Max, S On Actual - Q-learning is Off-policy using Maximum value, SARSA is On-policy using Actual action

mnemonics.title: Exploration Strategies
mnemonics.content: EGS - ε-Greedy, Softmax, UCB (common exploration strategies)

mnemonics.title: RL Challenges
mnemonics.content: EEC CDP - Exploration-Exploitation, Credit Assignment, Curse of Dimensionality, Partial observability
